data.title: Atlanta Fed GDPNow Lowers Second-Quarter Real GDP Growth Estimate to 1.2%
data.description: The Atlanta Fed’s GDPNow model lowered its estimate for second-quarter real GDP growth to 1.2% from 2.5%. According to Jin10, the update reflects a downward revision in the model’s expected pace of real GDP growth for the second quarter.

data.title: Marlinspike Partners Raises $127 Million Fund II for Defense, Industrial Startups
data.description:
Marlinspike Partners raised an oversubscribed $127 million Fund II to invest in defense and industrial startups, as investors increasingly back defense-focused companies, according to Bloomberg.

Marlinspike co-founder and CEO Neil Keegan, a former US Navy Surface Warfare Officer, discussed the fund on “Bloomberg Tech” with Ed Ludlow.

data.title: U.S. Seeks to Persuade Iran to Drop Strait of Hormuz Transit Fee Plan in Doha Talks
data.description:
The United States has sought to persuade Iran to abandon a proposed “transit fee” mechanism for passage through the Strait of Hormuz during talks in Doha. According to Jin10, the report was published by the Axios website.

The report did not provide further details on the discussions or any response from Iran.

data.title: Kevin Warsh Says He Left the Industry 15 Years Ago and Still Feels Effects of Global Financial Crisis
data.description:
Kevin Warsh said he left the industry 15 years ago but still carries trauma from the global financial crisis.

According to Odaily, Bitcoin News posted on X that Warsh made the remarks, saying he has been away from the industry for 15 years while continuing to feel the lingering effects of the crisis.

data.title: Iran Seeks Phased Timeline to Implement Memorandum of Understanding in Doha Talks
data.description: Iran has proposed implementing a memorandum of understanding according to a phased timeline during talks in Doha. According to Jin10, the report was attributed to Saudi Arabia’s Al Arabiya television channel.

data.title: Securitize President Says Tokenized RWAs Could Expand Retail Access to Stock Lending Revenue
data.description:
Securitize President Brett Redfearn said tokenized real-world assets could allow retail investors to capture a larger share of value generated from stock lending.

According to NS3.AI, Redfearn pointed to how stock lending revenue is currently distributed at major brokerages. NerdWallet data cited in the report says Robinhood keeps around 85% of associated stock lending revenue, while Charles Schwab splits the revenue 50-50 with customers.

Redfearn argued that tokenization could change how these economics are shared with retail investors by enabling different structures for distributing stock lending proceeds.

data.title: Iran Air Resumes Tehran–Mumbai Route After Five-Month Suspension, Iranian Media Reports
data.description: Iran Air has resumed operations on the Tehran–Mumbai–Tehran route after the service was suspended for five months. According to Jin10, the report was published by the Islamic Republic News Agency (IRNA).

data.title: U.S. Officials Say Strait Of Hormuz Sees About 10 Million Barrels Of Oil Flow
data.description: U.S. officials said the U.S. government assessed that oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz were about 10 million barrels. According to Jin10, the officials said this assessment reflected the U.S. government’s view of the Strait of Hormuz and could weaken Iran’s oil influence.

data.title: Iran Seeks Implementation of Five Memorandum Items Before Other Issues, Report Says
data.description: Iran has requested that five items in a memorandum of understanding be implemented before other matters are addressed. According to Jin10, the report was attributed to Saudi Arabia’s Al Arabiya television channel.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | White House Adds Pandemic Response Staff as Ebola Cases Rise
data.description: The Trump administration added two new pandemic response officials at the White House as it faces multiple infectious-disease threats, a White House spokesperson confirmed, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: Brightline Nears July 1 Debt Deadline With No Plan to Avoid Default
data.description: Brightline, the debt-laden private Florida railroad, is approaching a July 1 deadline that lenders have been watching for months. The company is likely to use what remains in its reserves to pay bondholders and stave off a formal default for the last time, according to Bloomberg.

data.title: Dow Jones Hits New Intraday Record High, Up 0.79%
data.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average set a new intraday record high and was up 0.79%. According to Jin10, the index reached the fresh high during the trading session.

data.title: Trump Says Micron Will Invest $250 Million Into a “Trump Account”
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump said Micron Technology announced a $250 million investment into a “Trump account.”

According to Jin10, Trump made the statement without providing additional details about the account or the timing and structure of the investment.

data.title: Russia’s First-Quarter GDP Fell 0.2% Year on Year
data.description: Russia’s GDP fell 0.2% year on year in the first quarter. According to Jin10, the previous reading was also -0.2%.

data.title: Russia’s Economy Ministry Says GDP Rose 0.3% Year on Year in May
data.description: Russia’s Economy Ministry said gross domestic product rose 0.3% year on year in May. According to Jin10, the ministry reported the May GDP growth rate at 0.3% compared with the same month a year earlier.

data.title: STOCKS | Amazon Shares Rise in After-Hours Trading After Closing at $238.34
data.description:
Amazon shares closed at $238.34 on June 30 and rose to $239.30 in after-hours trading.

According to NS3.AI, about 95% of the 41 analysts covering Amazon rate the stock a Buy or Strong Buy.

The analysts’ average price target is near $312.99.

data.title: Sen. Elizabeth Warren Calls for Legislation to Prevent Trump From Gaining More Crypto-Related Profits
data.description: U.S. Democratic Senator Elizabeth Warren said legislation is needed to prevent Trump from obtaining additional crypto-related profits. According to Odaily, Warren made the remarks while discussing the need for new laws aimed at limiting further cryptocurrency-related gains by Trump.

data.title: Meta Names Alex Schultz as First Chief Data Officer, Appoints Denise Moreno as CMO
data.description:
Meta Platforms appointed Alex Schultz as the company’s first chief data officer.

According to Jin10, Meta also said Denise Moreno will serve as chief marketing officer.

data.title: STOCKS | ASE Raises Advanced Chip Packaging Prices by More Than 20%
data.description:
ASE, the world’s largest outsourced semiconductor assembly and test (OSAT) provider, announced on July 1 that it will raise packaging prices again, with increases of more than 20% at the high end.

According to Odaily, the latest price hike covers multiple categories of advanced packaging technologies, including chip-on-wafer-on-substrate (CoWoS) and fan-out chip-on-substrate (FoCoS).

data.title: Vance Reiterates Claim That Iran’s Naval And Military Power Has Been Destroyed
data.description:
U.S. Vice President Vance reiterated that Iran’s naval and military power has been destroyed.

According to Jin10, Vance repeated the claim without providing additional details or evidence.
